Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Tomotaka Momozaki. Author, maintainer.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Momozaki T (2026). mhn: The Modified Half-Normal Distribution. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/t-momozaki/mhn. 

@Manual{,
  title = {mhn: The Modified Half-Normal Distribution},
  author = {Tomotaka Momozaki},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.1.0},
  url = {https://github.com/t-momozaki/mhn},
}

Sun J, Kong M, Pal S (2023). “The Modified-Half-Normal distribution: Properties and an efficient sampling scheme.” Communications in Statistics - Theory and Methods, 52(5), 1507–1536. doi:10.1080/03610926.2021.1934700. 

@Article{,
  title = {The Modified-Half-Normal distribution: Properties and an efficient sampling scheme},
  author = {Jingchao Sun and Maiying Kong and Subhadip Pal},
  journal = {Communications in Statistics - Theory and Methods},
  year = {2023},
  volume = {52},
  number = {5},
  pages = {1507--1536},
  doi = {10.1080/03610926.2021.1934700},
}

Gao F, Wang H (2025). “Generating modified-half-normal random variates by a relaxed transformed density rejection method.” Communications in Statistics - Simulation and Computation. doi:10.1080/03610918.2025.2524551. 

@Article{,
  title = {Generating modified-half-normal random variates by a relaxed transformed density rejection method},
  author = {Fang Gao and Hong-Bin Wang},
  journal = {Communications in Statistics - Simulation and Computation},
  year = {2025},
  doi = {10.1080/03610918.2025.2524551},
}
